summary: Iteration 9 testing complete. All backend tests passed (9/9). All frontend features verified for CustomerPage.js - orders section, total bill, discount reasons, and service charge display all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: CustomerPage.js correctly fetches service_charge_percentage from GET /api/settings
Menu items display discount badges (-X%) and discount explanation text ('Xüsusi endirim: -X%')
Cart shows service charge info note: '10% servis haqqı masa bağlananda əlavə olunacaq'
Orders panel shows per-item discount with original price strikethrough and 'Məhsul endirimi: -X%' label
Bill summary correctly shows: Sifarişlər cəmi, Servis haqqı (10%), and Təxmini ümumi hesab
Service charge note visible: '* Servis haqqı masa bağlananda hesablanır'
All data-testid attributes present for testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - Masa 1 with active session
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 CustomerPage features fully tested. Key features verified: 1) Customer page loads at /customer/{tableId}, 2) Menu items show discount badges and 'Xüsusi endirim: -X%' text, 3) Cart shows service charge info note, 4) Orders panel shows per-item discounts with strikethrough prices and 'Məhsul endirimi: -X%', 5) Bill summary shows orders total + service charge (10%) + estimated grand total, 6) Service charge note: 'Servis haqqı masa bağlananda hesablanır'. All APIs working: GET /api/settings, POST /api/sessions/start/{tableId}, GET /api/orders/session/{session_token}, POST /api/orders, GET /api/discounts/active.

features_tested.add_to_cart: PASS - '+Əlavə et' button and quantity controls work
features_tested.cart_discount_percentage: PASS - Cart shows item discount percentage
features_tested.cart_service_charge_note: PASS - '10% servis haqqı masa bağlananda əlavə olunacaq'
features_tested.orders_panel_opens: PASS - Orders button in header opens panel
features_tested.orders_strikethrough_prices: PASS - Original prices shown with strikethrough
features_tested.orders_campaign_discount: PASS - Campaign discount details shown if applicable
features_tested.bill_summary_grand_total: PASS - 'Təxmini ümumi hesab' with grand total
features_tested.service_charge_note: PASS - '* Servis haqqı masa bağlananda hesablanır'

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/orders - PASS (creates order with per-item discount info)
